subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of Baha! Thy sweet and beneficial concise letter hath indeed brought comfort and joy to 'Abdu'l-Baha [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء نامه ملیح مفید مختصر شما بسیار سبب راحت و مسرت عبدالبهاء گشت نامه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @the power of words; of speech
